mapper.insert:
SELECT PROJECTS_SEQ .NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO project (projectId, projectType, pmoType, title, description, startDate, endDate, createdDate, status, progress) VALUES(#{projectId}, #{projectType}, #{pmoType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, SYSDATE, 1, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.projectId = ep.projectId WHERE ep.empId = #{empId}
